name: qwik-v2-optimizer-destructure-reassign-bug
description: Minimal reproduction of a Qwik v2 optimizer bug: the destructured-parameter rewrite pass in @qwik.dev/core@2.0.0-beta.35 either drops the assignment (RHS is a string literal) or leaves the LHS as an undeclared identifier (RHS is a template literal), producing silent miscompilation or a hung dev SSR request.
